name: abra
description: Developer scripts for Abra. The production runtime and CLI are Go.
author: Abra contributors

scripts.check:scripts: bash -n scripts/*.sh && node --check scripts/abra-tier1-eval.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-tier23-eval.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-golden-eval.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-provider-benchmark.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-perf-eval.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-dogfood-eval.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-release-gate.mjs
